changeSet.author: jmix-spreadsheet
changeSet.comment: Create SHIPMENT_VIEW with cumulative sum field
changeSet.sql: CREATE VIEW SHIPMENT_VIEW AS SELECT s.ID, s.VERSION, s.DAY_, s.PLANT_ID, s.PRODUCT_ID, s.VESSEL_ID, s.VALUE_, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s2.VALUE_), 0) FROM SHIPMENT s2 WHERE s2.PLANT_ID = s.PLANT_ID AND s2.PRODUCT_ID = s.PRODUCT_ID AND s2.VESSEL_ID = s.VESSEL_ID AND s2.DAY_ <= s.DAY_) AS CUMULATIVE_SUM FROM SHIPMENT s
